title: Woodtype Shields
description: Now you can get shields with any type of wood planks!
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2bad7152180756660c6e9f7b70add7837a88955.png)

## Description
Woodtype Shields is a texture pack that retextures the shield to make it possible to have all wood variants just by renaming it on the anvil.

## Important notes
- This package does not require CIT Resewn or Optifine in 1.21.5 and above
- Regular shield was renamed to "Oak Shield"
- The shield position has been lowered to increase vision in first person view
- Command to get a renamed item in creative mode: /give @p shield[custom_name='Example']
- Go to the gallery to see examples

## How it works
Rename the shield with the respective names:

<details>
<summary>ITEMS</summary>

- Acacia Shield
- Bamboo Shield
- Birch Shield
- Cherry Shield
- Crimson Shield
- Dark Oak Shield
- Jungle Shield
- Mangrove Shield
- Pale Oak Shield
- Spruce Shield
- Warped Shield

</details>
